title: carex longifructus
intro: Carex longifructus, also known as the Chinese club-rush or long-fruited sedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in China, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, and is often used to treat conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Carex longifructus is typically used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
